headline: A new paper argues Microsoft exaggerated its quantum claims a year ago
summary: New paper in Nature questions Microsoft's "breakthrough" Majorana 1 quantum chip. The critique challenges the basic technology of the topological qubit unveiled in Feb 2025. Critics suggest Microsoft may have exaggerated its quantum computing claims.

headline: Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
summary: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna denies staff used AI for defense bill text, citing "spellcheck" use. The denial came after screenshots on X showed an AI-generated amendment summary. Luna explicitly states "NO Legislation is ever drafted with AI."

headline: GTA VI is a worrying sign for the future of physical games
summary: Rockstar Games announced GTA VI's price at $79.99 for its November 19th launch. Physical copies will only contain a digital download code, not a disc. This decision raises concerns about the future of physical game releases.

headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Amazon Prime Day features significant discounts on various Apple products. Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3 have reached new low prices. These deals are among the best ever seen for Apple items during Prime Day.

headline: VITURE XR Glasses Are 20% Off for Prime Day, Including Its Flagship Beast Glasses for Games and Movies
summary: VITURE XR Glasses are 20% off during Amazon Prime Day. Deals include the flagship Beast Glasses, perfect for games and movies. Enjoy a portable, 175-inch simulated display for your favorite handheld consoles.

headline: Dungeon Crawler Carl T-Shirts Are 30% off at Amazon for Prime Day Today
summary: Dungeon Crawler Carl T-shirts are 30% off on Amazon for Prime Day. The popular book series has expanded into a full merchandise franchise. Fans can grab graphic tees inspired by the hit Dungeon Crawler Carl universe.

headline: I Tracked Down All of the Best Board Game Deals for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Discover a curated list of the best board game deals for Amazon Prime Day. Top picks feature genuinely fun games with significant discounts. Find great savings to expand your board game collection.

headline: Save Up to $1,300 on Speediance's Gym Monster All-In-One Home Gym Series for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Save up to $1,300 on Speediance's Gym Monster all-in-one home gym series. The offer is available during Amazon Prime Day. Upgrade your fitness setup with these substantial discounts.

headline: Why this heatwave feels worse than the last one
summary: Current heatwave is perceived as more uncomfortable than previous ones. A combination of factors contributes to this increased feeling of discomfort. Simon King explains why this heatwave feels particularly bad.

headline: Babies and mothers died after 'systemic and sustained' failings, largest NHS maternity review finds
summary: Largest NHS maternity review reveals "systemic and sustained" failings led to deaths. The Donna Ockenden report found a "bullying and toxic culture" within services. Serious deficiencies in care resulted in the deaths of mothers and babies.

headline: 'From excitement to emptiness': Families affected by largest NHS maternity scandal tell their stories
summary: Families affected by the biggest NHS maternity scandal share their stories. Their experiences highlight the devastating impact of the systemic failures. Accounts vividly describe the journey "from excitement to emptiness."

headline: King meets women's cricket team that is not allowed to exist
summary: King Charles met with members of the Afghan women's cricket team. The team is currently prohibited from playing official games. The King's meeting showed support for the female athletes.
